summary: Checked 22 claims, found 7 mirages (5 critical, 2 major)

findings.claim: tech-spec says: internal/stat/stat.go — export getSysticksLocal → GetSysticksLocal so record package can call it
findings.reality: getSysticksLocal() is still unexported at line 372 of internal/stat/stat.go. No GetSysticksLocal exists anywhere in the codebase (only in worktrees). The spec describes this as a prerequisite change, but it has not been applied to the develop branch.
findings.source: 003-feat-procpidstat-record-report-tech-spec.md, section Modified components table and Decision 3
findings.fix: Export getSysticksLocal → GetSysticksLocal in internal/stat/stat.go and update its one internal caller (NewCollector at line 88)

findings.claim: tech-spec says: tarConfig has fields isLocal bool, ticks float64, cpuCount int, ioAvailable bool, delayAcctAvailable bool
findings.reality: tarConfig struct (record/recorder.go lines 26–29) has only two fields: filename string and append bool. None of the five new fields exist.
findings.fix: Task 02 must add the five new fields to tarConfig before recorder logic can be implemented

findings.claim: tech-spec says: tarRecorder gains stateful fields: prevProcPidStats, currProcPidStats, prevProcPidIO, currProcPidIO, lastCollect
findings.reality: tarRecorder struct (record/recorder.go lines 33–38) has only four fields: config, file, fileFlags, writer. None of the five new stateful fields exist.
findings.source: 003-feat-procpidstat-record-report-tech-spec.md, section Data Models / tarRecorder and New components
findings.fix: Task 02 must add all five stateful fields to tarRecorder

findings.claim: tech-spec says: metadata struct in report/report.go gains ticks float64 and cpuCount int fields
findings.reality: metadata struct (report/report.go lines 93–96) has only one field: version int. Neither ticks nor cpuCount exist.
findings.source: 003-feat-procpidstat-record-report-tech-spec.md, section Data Models / metadata and Decision 6
findings.fix: Task 03 must add ticks float64 and cpuCount int to metadata struct

findings.claim: tech-spec says: describeReport map in report/report.go gains a 'procpidstat' entry
findings.reality: describeReport map (report/report.go lines 506–528) has 20 entries covering all existing views but no 'procpidstat' key.
findings.source: 003-feat-procpidstat-record-report-tech-spec.md, section Modified components table and Decision 7
findings.fix: Task 03 must add 'procpidstat' to the describeReport map

findings.claim: tech-spec says: isFilenameOK accepts 'sysinfo' prefix alongside 'meta'
findings.reality: isFilenameOK (report/report.go line 318) checks s[0] != report && s[0] != "meta" — only 'meta' is whitelisted as a secondary prefix; 'sysinfo' is not accepted.
findings.fix: Task 03 must extend isFilenameOK to accept 'sysinfo' as a valid secondary prefix

findings.claim: tech-spec says: cmd/report/report.go has showProcPidStat bool option, -N / --proc-stats flag, and case opts.showProcPidStat in selectReport
findings.reality: The options struct (cmd/report/report.go lines 15–37) has no showProcPidStat field. The init() function (lines 58–80) registers no -N flag. selectReport (lines 123–180) has no procpidstat case. Neither the flag nor the field exist.
findings.source: 003-feat-procpidstat-record-report-tech-spec.md, section Modified components table and Task 03
findings.fix: Task 03 must add showProcPidStat bool to options, register -N/--proc-stats flag in init(), and add the case to selectReport

verified_claims: buildProcPidResult exists in internal/stat/procpidstat.go at line 225

buildProcPidResult signature: (activity PGresult, prevStats, currStats map[int]ProcPidStat, prevIO, currIO map[int]ProcPidIO, ioAvailable bool, delayAcctAvailable bool, ticks float64, itv float64, cpuCount int) PGresult
getSysticksLocal() exists in internal/stat/stat.go at line 372 (unexported)
record/recorder.go exists — tarRecorder and tarConfig structs present
internal/postgres/postgres.go — DB.Local bool field exists at line 25
internal/view/view.go — procpidstat view has DiffIntvl=[2]int{0,0} at line 288
internal/view/view.go — procpidstat NotRecordable: true at line 295 (unchanged from current state)
record/record_test.go — TestFilterViews_NotRecordable currently asserts procpidstat IS filtered (NotRecordable=true), matching current code — spec says this test needs inversion
report/report.go — isFilenameOK function exists at line 309
report/report.go — describeReport function exists at line 505
internal/stat/procpidstat.go — CheckIOAvailable(pid int) error exists at line 175
internal/stat/procpidstat.go — CheckDelayAcctAvailable() bool exists at line 188
internal/stat/stat.go — Collector.Update procpidstat block exists at lines 215–275
